title: SKY SKY135 Sky-Q Voice Remote Control

crossSellProducts.title: DURACELL Optimum AAA Alkaline Batteries - Pack of 4

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: The ONE FOR ALL SKY135 Sky-Q Voice Remote Control is perfect for Sky Q 1TB, 2TB, and Sky Q Mini box. Voice control allows you to find what you like. Press Q on the front of your Sky Q box and the remote will start beeping.
goodToKnow: Compatibility: Sky Q set top box
